title: BEM-550.3 force runtime intake
objective:
Run script:
"""
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
scripts=Path('scripts'); scripts.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
wfs=Path('.github/workflows'); wfs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state=Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json'); state.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocol=protocols/'CURATOR_RUNTIME_INTAKE.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-550.3 | Runtime Curator Intake\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 15:28 (UTC+3)\n\nExternal GPT/Claude/Telegram enter only through curator. Runtime validates required fields, rejects duplicates, writes curator_intake_validation and curator_assignment to transport, updates role_cycle_state.\n')
script=scripts/'curator_runtime_intake.py'
script.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env python3
import json, os
from pathlib import Path
TRANSPORT=Path("governance/transport/results.jsonl")
STATE=Path("governance/state/role_cycle_state.json")
VALID_SOURCES=["gpt","claude","telegram"]
VALID_TYPES=["development","audit","hotfix"]
def load_rows():
    rows=[]
    if TRANSPORT.exists():
        for line in TRANSPORT.read_text(encoding="utf-8",errors="ignore").splitlines():
            if line.strip():
                try: rows.append(json.loads(line))
                except Exception: pass
    return rows
def append(rec):
    TRANSPORT.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
    with TRANSPORT.open("a",encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(json.dumps(rec,ensure_ascii=False)+"\\n")
trace=os.environ.get("TRACE_ID","")
task={"trace_id":trace,"source":os.environ.get("SOURCE","gpt"),"task_type":os.environ.get("TASK_TYPE","development"),"title":os.environ.get("TITLE",""),"objective":os.environ.get("OBJECTIVE",""),"created_at":os.environ.get("BEM_TIMESTAMP","workflow_runtime"),"blocker":None}
errors=[]
for key in ["trace_id","source","task_type","title","objective"]:
    if not str(task.get(key,"")).strip(): errors.append("missing_"+key)
if task["source"] not in VALID_SOURCES: errors.append("invalid_source")
if task["task_type"] not in VALID_TYPES: errors.append("invalid_task_type")
if trace and trace in [r.get("trace_id") for r in load_rows() if r.get("trace_id")]: errors.append("duplicate_trace_id")
accepted=not errors
blocker=None if accepted else {"code":"CURATOR_INTAKE_INVALID","errors":errors}
cycle=trace or "curator-intake-invalid"
validation={"record_type":"curator_intake_validation","cycle_id":cycle,"trace_id":trace,"source":"curator-runtime","status":"accepted" if accepted else "rejected","task":task,"artifact_path":"governance/transport/results.jsonl","commit_sha":None,"blocker":blocker,"created_at":task["created_at"]}
append(validation)
if accepted:
    append({"record_type":"curator_assignment","cycle_id":cycle,"trace_id":trace,"source":"curator-runtime","from_role":"curator","to_role":"role_orchestrator","status":"completed","decision":"submit_to_orchestrator","reason":"runtime_intake_validated","artifact_path":"governance/transport/results.jsonl","commit_sha":None,"blocker":None,"created_at":task["created_at"]})
st={}
if STATE.exists():
    try: st=json.loads(STATE.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    except Exception: st={}
st.update({"cycle_id":cycle,"curator_status":"ASSIGNED" if accepted else "BLOCKED","active_role":"curator","next_role":"role_orchestrator" if accepted else None,"last_curator_runtime_intake":validation,"blocker":blocker})
STATE.write_text(json.dumps(st,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+"\\n",encoding="utf-8")
print(json.dumps(validation,ensure_ascii=False))
''')
wf=wfs/'curator-intake.yml'
wf.write_text('''name: Curator Intake
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      trace_id:
        required: true
        type: string
      source:
        required: true
        default: gpt
        type: string
      task_type:
        required: true
        default: development
        type: string
      title:
        required: true
        type: string
      objective:
        required: true
        type: string
permissions:
  contents: write
jobs:
  intake:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Runtime curator intake
        env:
          TRACE_ID: ${{ inputs.trace_id }}
          SOURCE: ${{ inputs.source }}
          TASK_TYPE: ${{ inputs.task_type }}
          TITLE: ${{ inputs.title }}
          OBJECTIVE: ${{ inputs.objective }}
          BEM_TIMESTAMP: workflow_runtime
        run: python3 scripts/curator_runtime_intake.py
      - name: Commit intake result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/transport/results.jsonl governance/state/role_cycle_state.json
          git commit -m "Curator intake ${{ inputs.trace_id }}" || echo "No changes"
          git push
''')
record={'record_type':'bem550_3_runtime_curator_intake_ready','cycle_id':'bem550-3-runtime-curator-intake','source':'gpt','status':'completed','artifact_path':'governance/reports/bem550_3_runtime_curator_intake.md','commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 15:28 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as f: f.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
report=reports/'bem550_3_runtime_curator_intake.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-550.3 | Runtime Curator Intake | PASS\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 15:28 (UTC+3)\n\n## Files\n- governance/protocols/CURATOR_RUNTIME_INTAKE.md\n- scripts/curator_runtime_intake.py\n- .github/workflows/curator-intake.yml\n\n## Blocker\nnull\n')
proof=proofs/'bem550_3_runtime_curator_intake_force.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-550.3 PASS: runtime curator intake files created.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(protocol),str(script),str(wf),str(transport),str(report),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-550.3 runtime curator intake explicitly implemented')
"""
No issue comments.
